title: Chicken Pungent Casserole
description: A hearty and flavorful casserole made with chicken, spring vegetables, and a blend of cheeses.
instructions: Cook the pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, sauté the onion and carrots until tender.
Add the bell peppers and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned.
Transfer the chicken and vegetable mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, combine the Italian cheese blend and cooked pasta.
Top the chicken and vegetable mixture with the pasta and cheese mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the casserole is hot and the cheese is melted.
